title: ANC - Transparency mode behavior during the call
scenario: Transparency Mode in Device Settings ANC tab is not greyed out and allows selection during an active call
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Device Settings and select the ANC tab.
4. Verify that the Transparency Mode option is visible.
5. Initiate or join an active phone call using the connected Poly Bluetooth device.
6. While on the active call, return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate back to Device Settings > ANC tab.
8. Attempt to tap/select the Transparency Mode option.
expected: The Transparency Mode option should be greyed out and non-selectable while on a call. If the user taps it, a pop-up dialog should appear with the message "This settings cannot be adjusted while on a call" and an "Ok" button. Tapping "Ok" closes the dialog.
